title: Check graphiti MCP server process and restart

log.context: Check graphiti MCP server process and restart

Everything is confirmed. Here's the summary:

**How it was running:** Docker container `docker-graphiti-mcp-1` using `zepai/knowledge-graph-mcp:standalone`, launched via `docker compose -f docker-compose-falkordb.yml` from `/mnt/data/graphiti/repo/mcp_server/docker/`. The compose file loads `/mnt/data/graphiti/repo/mcp_server/.env` as its env_file.
